organization.organization_background: Utkrusht is a proof-of-skills marketplace that helps agile teams find talent with strong fundamental concepts with within days. We help aspiring professionals improve their profile with continuous improvement in their skills, documenting their journey and helping them fulfill their potential. We primarily build, conduct, proctor and disseminate proof-of-skill assessments in Technical domains like AI, ML, Fullstack development, High scale distributed systems, DevOps etc but do help non-tech roles like Sales, HR, Marketing etc

role_context: At the advanced level, a Scala engineer with 6+ years of experience is expected to independently own substantial services or platform modules in a production Scala codebase, designing and implementing business logic, APIs, data models, asynchronous workflows, and integrations with databases, messaging systems, HTTP services, or stream-processing pipelines. Day to day, they make sound decisions about Scala language features and architecture—choosing between functional, object-oriented, or hybrid approaches; shaping type-safe APIs and ADTs; handling effects, concurrency, resource safety, and error models correctly; and diagnosing production issues related to performance, threading, memory, or library behavior. They typically need little direction on feature delivery, refactoring, testing strategy, build configuration, or framework usage, while seeking senior guidance mainly on broader cross-system trade-offs, organization-wide standards, or high-impact architectural changes. They are also expected to raise the Scala quality bar in the codebase by reviewing for correctness and idiomatic usage, establishing practical patterns, and guiding less experienced developers through complex topics such as implicits or givens, effect systems, collection performance, and Scala 2 to Scala 3 migration concerns.
